name: Yaheetech Set of 2 Modern Fabric Upholstered Dining Chairs for Living Room Dining Room, Beige
description:
• Are you looking for classic-style chairs for your dining room? This pack of two fabric armless chairs could be a great option. Upholstered in breathable, linen-like fabric, the seat is padded with high-density foam for enhanced comfort. Additionally, the chair features an ergonomically curved backrest for a longer duration. The sturdy rubberwood legs, equipped with protective pads, ensure stability and durability, with each chair supporting up to 300 lb. Bronze-finish nailheads embellish the backrest and seat, adding a touch of classic elegance to the set.

  • Specifications:
  • Quantity: 2
  • Color: Beige
  • Materials: Polyester, Rubberwood, Solid Wood, Engineered Wood, Foam, Sinuous Spring, Non-
  • woven Fabrics
  • Assembled Dimensions: 16.5″ W × 23.5″ D × 38″ H
  • Seat Width: 16.5″
  • Seat Depth: 16.7″
  • Seat Height: 20″
  • Maximum Weight Capacity (ea.): 300 lb
  • Item Weight (per dining chair): 14.8 lb
  • Shipping Weight: 32 lb

  • Please see the image for exact measurement.

  • Please allow ±0.6″ measurement tolerance.
  • For your safety, please do not stand on the seat.
